results.query: 查询所有客户的基本信息
results.sql:
SELECT 
    customer_id, 
    customer_name, 
    gender, 
    age, 
    marital_status, 
    occupation, 
    education, 
    income_level, 
    phone, 
    email, 
    city, 
    province, 
    register_date, 
    last_login_date, 
    status, 
    customer_level
FROM 
    bank_customer

results.query: 查找高收入水平的客户
results.sql:
SELECT customer_id, customer_name, income_level
FROM bank_customer
WHERE income_level = '高收入'

results.query: 统计每个城市的客户数量
results.sql:
SELECT city, COUNT(*) AS customer_count
FROM bank_customer
GROUP BY city

results.query: 查询客户及其账户信息
results.sql:
SELECT 
    bc.customer_id,
    bc.customer_name,
    bc.email,
    bc.phone,
    ca.account_id,
    ca.account_number,
    ca.account_type,
    ca.balance,
    ca.currency,
    ca.open_date,
    ca.status
FROM 
    bank_customer bc
JOIN 
    customer_account ca ON bc.customer_id = ca.customer_id

results.query: 查找有贷款记录的客户
results.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT bc.customer_id, bc.customer_name
FROM bank_customer bc
JOIN credit_loan_records clr ON bc.customer_id = clr.customer_id

results.query: 查询客户的信用卡额度和使用情况
results.sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name,
    cc.credit_limit,
    cc.used_amount,
    cc.six_month_avg_used
FROM 
    bank_customer c
JOIN 
    credit_card_records cc ON c.customer_id = cc.customer_id

results.query: 统计每个客户等级的平均贷款余额
results.sql:
SELECT 
    bc.customer_level, 
    AVG(clr.loan_balance) AS avg_loan_balance
FROM 
    bank_customer bc
JOIN 
    credit_loan_records clr ON bc.customer_id = clr.customer_id
GROUP BY 
    bc.customer_level

results.query: 查找年营收超过 1000 万的企业客户及其法定代表人
results.sql:
SELECT 
    c.company_name, 
    c.legal_representative
FROM 
    corporate_customer c
WHERE 
    c.annual_revenue > 10000000

results.query: 查询近 3 个月有交易记录的客户
results.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT bc.customer_id
FROM bank_customer bc
JOIN business_transaction bt ON bc.customer_id = bt.customer_id
WHERE bt.transaction_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '3 months'

results.query: 查询信用评分低于 600 的客户及其贷款记录
results.sql:
SELECT 
    bc.customer_id,
    bc.customer_name,
    clr.loan_amount,
    clr.loan_balance,
    clr.loan_type,
    clr.loan_status,
    clr.start_date,
    clr.end_date
FROM 
    bank_customer bc
JOIN 
    user_credit_report ucr ON bc.customer_id = ucr.customer_id
JOIN 
    credit_loan_records clr ON bc.customer_id = clr.customer_id
WHERE 
    ucr.credit_score < 600
